name: Start / Finish (Heavenly Stagecoach)
how_to_see: Lower parking lot at Stagecoach Lodge — start line and finish celebration.
parking_note: Crew may park overnight. Same site at the end.

name: Heavenly
how_to_see: Same venue as start — quick stop early in the race.

name: Sierra at Tahoe
how_to_see: First major crew stop — good place to see Harvey mid-morning Saturday.
parking_note: Display crew pass. Standard aid parking.

name: Tahoe City
how_to_see: Walk 0.2 mi from Transit Center parking — iconic lakefront stop.
parking_note: Park at Transit Center, walk to aid.

name: Brockway Summit
how_to_see: Crew parks and walks 0.6 mi — sleep stop for many runners.
parking_note: Designated crew parking, then walk in.

name: Village Green
how_to_see: Designated green-marked crew parking — late-race crew access.

name: Finish (Heavenly Stagecoach)
how_to_see: Back where it started — plan to see Harvey finish Monday; be at Stagecoach for the buckle.
parking_note: Lower lot. Plan: Monday finish. Official cutoff Tue 6:00 PM.
